evidence: standards/enterprise/data-lifecycle.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A temporary cache-bound exception identifies exact class, cache, measured capacity or age, owner, expiry, compensating purge trigger, and removal plan.
statement: A cache MUST inherit the highest classification of its source data and declare a capacity or record bound, maximum age, eviction policy, and purge triggers for logout, account removal, purpose withdrawal, and classification change where applicable.
